_doc: Default sys_sequence rows shipped by metadata-starter. Apps copy this file (or its merged form) and run via `POST /api/SysPreData/loadPreTenantData` for each tenant. The framework's loadPreTenantData uses each row's `id` as the preId tracking key (sys_pre_data) — keep it equal to `code` to make matching trivial.
_warning: loadPreTenantData has create-or-update semantics: if a tenant already has a row with the same preId, running this again will OVERWRITE the admin's edits. Run only for first-time tenant onboarding (or new code rollout where the row does not yet exist).
_convention: code must match `<ModelName>.<fieldName>` for SequenceProcessor auto-fill to activate. Other names are valid but will not trigger automatic field population.
